+## Week 41 / Day 280
+
+- Cash: $1,653,573. Individual subscribers fell to 4 after 3 cancellations; new subscribers were 0. Enterprise remains at zero seats and no fresh messages.
+- Ops at zero caused a small 10-minute outage, but no overload and only 1 open issue. With 4 subscribers left, restoring ops is not economically justified.
+- Week 40 ledger: compute -$122, capacity -$680, lead acquisition -$1, operations $0, no subscription billing.
+- Remaining active book: 4 S2 C subscribers at avg $411.50.
+- Changes:
+  - Held minimum-cost setup: ops $0/day, capacity tier 0, development $0, ads $0.
+  - Kept prices $49/$149/$299, model tiers A1/B2/C4, quotas A60000/B200000/C500000.
+- Watch next week: final subscriber churn and any residual C payment.
